news.t: Solve the Cash Conundrum With Highly Rated CLO ETFs
Fidelity Investments® Expands Active ETF Lineup With Two CLO ETFs: Fidelity AAA CLO ETF (FAAA) and Fidelity CLO ETF (FCLO)

overview.description: The Fidelity CLO ETF (FCLO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund primarily investing in USD-denominated collateralized loan obligations (CLOs) rated BBB+ to B-. It seeks to generate income. FCLO was launched on Feb 12, 2026 and is issued by Fidelity.
